---
title: About
---

I'm an ecosystem modeller at the UK Centre for Ecology & Hydrology (CEH). This site collects data analyses of no fixed abode — pieces of work that don't have a natural home elsewhere, mostly written up as reproducible R/Quarto documents.

### Further info

See [GitHub](https://github.com/peterlevy) or [ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Peter-Levy-2) or [ORCID](https://orcid.org/0000-0002-8505-1901).
